title: Deduplicate sandbox and CLI duplicate logic
description: Consolidate remaining duplicated logic identified in branch review. Scope includes shared SES verifier/hardening policy helpers where practical and the duplicated CLI callable stdin/execution/help flow between packages/cli/lib/exec.ts and packages/cli/lib/piece.ts.
acceptance_criteria: Shared helpers replace duplicated stdin JSON reading and callable execution/help flow in CLI; duplicated sandbox policy/hardening logic is reduced further or intentionally documented; regression coverage remains green.
